title: Impervious (shuttle)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Impervious}}
'''''Impervious''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] used by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Elegos A'Kla]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. It fought at the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Dantooine]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
